narrative:
Nimishillen township has 6,631 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.1 percentage points.
